Hero.titlePart1: We buy all types of scrap in
Hero.description: Specialized in buying all types of scrap, copper, and aluminum in any quantity. We provide free inspection and loading with instant and rewarding cash payment!

items.title: Buying A/C Scrap
items.description: We buy all types of old and damaged air conditioners (Split, Window, Central) at the best prices, regardless of their condition.
items.keywords: A/C scrap buyer, sell damaged A/C

items.title: Aluminum Scrap
items.description: We buy aluminum waste from windows, doors, and structures. We weigh and evaluate honestly at your location.

items.title: Brass Scrap
items.description: We buy all brass parts, pipes, and mechanical pieces at highly competitive prices.

items.title: Electrical Transformer Scrap
items.description: Specialists in buying old and broken electrical transformers of all sizes and capacities.

items.title: Buying Generators
items.description: We buy used and broken power generators, whether for factories or buildings, and provide transport.

items.title: Stainless Steel Scrap
items.description: We buy stainless steel waste from restaurant equipment, tanks, and structures at current market prices.

items.title: Construction and Building Scrap
items.description: We buy demolition and construction site waste, including rebar and metal structures, with full site clearance.
items.keywords: construction scrap, used rebar, demolition waste

items.title: Electronic and Electrical Scrap
items.description: We buy wires, electronic boards, and damaged electrical parts at the best evaluation for copper and metal weight.

items.title: Copper Scrap
items.description: We buy pure copper, stripped cables, and refrigeration pipes at the highest price per kilo in the market.

items.title: Iron Scrap
items.description: We buy huge quantities of iron, structures, and plates, with specialized trucks available for immediate loading and transport.
items.keywords: buy iron scrap, heavy and light scrap

HouseShifting.description: Whether you're moving neighborhoods or to another city from Dammam, we prepare a moving, packing, dismantling, and installation team — providing a clear quote before we start.

features.title: Professional Dismantling & Assembly
features.desc: A team that dismantles and installs bedrooms, kitchens, and A/Cs without scratches.

features.title: Packing & Securing
features.desc: Packaging for glass and sensitive appliances so your furniture arrives safely.

features.title: Transport in Equipped Trucks
features.desc: Covered trucks suitable for furniture size inside and outside Dammam.

features.title: Clear Timings
features.desc: We set the time with you and commit to arrival and delivery as much as possible.

HouseShifting.note: Mention the type of furniture, neighborhood, and floor approximately so we can give you a clearer estimate.
HouseShifting.waMessage: Hello, I want to inquire about the furniture/house moving service.

Experience.title: Market Experience & Trust Spanning Years
Experience.description: We are the first choice for the residents of Dammam and the Eastern Province regarding buying, selling used furniture, and moving furniture, as attested by our clients.

About.description: We specialize in buying used furniture in Dammam, Khobar, and Dhahran. We evaluate your furniture properly, give you the best price, and finish quickly without exhausting trips.

features.title: Excellent Prices That Satisfy You
features.desc: We give you a fair evaluation for all types of furniture, A/Cs, and appliances.

features.title: We Come The Same Day
features.desc: As soon as you call us, we come for inspection and give you your cash immediately.

features.title: Dismantling & Moving Is On Us
features.desc: We carry the furniture and dismantle it for free without you paying a riyal.

About.callActionDesc: Call us now and our representative will arrive to inspect your furniture for free.

Testimonials.description: Testimonials we are proud of from our esteemed clients in Dammam, Khobar, and Dhahran.

reviews.name: Ahmed Abdullah
reviews.text: Excellent and fast service! I called them, and they came to see the furniture on the same day. I highly recommend dealing with them; their evaluation of the furniture was very fair and they gave me my cash on the spot.

reviews.name: Fahd Al-Otaibi
reviews.text: I moved my furniture with them and bought from them too. A highly professional team and excellent prices. Honestly one of the best I've dealt with in Dammam.

reviews.name: Khalid Saeed
reviews.text: Credibility and honesty in purchasing. I sold them A/Cs and used appliances, and the price was satisfying. They dismantled and moved everything for free and without any hassle.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.description: Everything you need to know about the used furniture purchasing and moving service.

items.q: Do you buy all types of furniture?
items.a: Yes, we buy bedrooms, kitchens, electrical appliances, A/Cs, majlis, and office furniture.

items.q: How is the furniture price determined?
items.a: Our representative visits you to inspect the furniture, evaluates it based on its condition and usability, and gives you the best market price.

items.q: Is the inspection and dismantling service free?
items.a: Absolutely. The inspection is completely free. If an agreement is reached, we cover all dismantling and moving costs.

items.q: When is the furniture value paid?
items.a: Payment is made in cash immediately upon agreement and receiving the furniture.

items.q: Do you provide house moving services?
items.a: Yes, we provide furniture and house moving with dismantling, installation, and packaging depending on the agreement. Check the 'Moving' section at the top of the page or contact us.

Footer.desc: The best shop for buying used furniture in Dammam and the Eastern Province. We give you the best prices and remove the furniture quickly and effortlessly.
